import React, { useEffect } from "react" import heroTest from '../../assets/hero-test.png' import './MusicPage.css' import 'aos/dist/aos.css' import Aos from 'aos'; const MusicPage = () => { useEffect(() => { Aos.init( {duration: 2000} ) window.scrollTo(0, 0) }, []) return (

Artistry: Bigger than music

The deeper I get into music the more I fall in love with everything that comes with it... I only started releasing my work about a year ago but the more I do the more I realize how deep the concept of artistry goes.

It's an expression of self.

I love the intricacies of production just as much as the album artwork, and bringing a mere vision or idea to life is such an incredible experience to have.

I only wish this love to continue. Until then I don't plan on stopping keeping it alive. Check out my music on Spotify .

) } export default MusicPage
